message:
fix(freeze): add missing JSValueNative methods for native-embed builds

- Add missing methods to JSValueNative: callConstructor, definePropertyStr,
  deleteProperty, getGlobalUndef, getIndex, getIterator, isInstanceOf,
  iteratorClose, iteratorNext, setField, throw, toObject, toPropKey
- Add setIndex alias for setPropertyUint32
- Add toInt32 method to CompressedValue for codegen compatibility
- Add strictNeq method to CompressedValue
- Fix JS_DeleteProperty FFI signature (prop is u32 atom, not JSValue)
- Use js_frozen_* helpers for iterator operations
- Fix opcode_emitter to use zig_runtime.jsNewObject instead of JSValue.newObject

These methods are required by frozen codegen but were missing from the
native JSValueNative struct, causing compilation errors when building
npm packages like rxjs and zod with native-embed.
